name: Buff Mult
description: Active 2-to-6 buffered multiple. Two independent channels: Input 1 feeds outputs 1–3; Input 2 feeds outputs 4–6. Input 1 normalizes to Input 2 when Input 2 is unpatched.

inputs.name: Input 1
inputs.description: Signal input for channel 1. Normalizes to Input 2 when Input 2 is unpatched.

inputs.name: Input 2
inputs.description: Signal input for channel 2. Sends signal only to outputs 4, 5, and 6.

outputs.name: Output 4
outputs.description: Buffered copy of Input 2 (or Input 1 if Input 2 unpatched).

outputs.name: Output 5
outputs.description: Buffered copy of Input 2 (or Input 1 if Input 2 unpatched).

outputs.name: Output 6
outputs.description: Buffered copy of Input 2 (or Input 1 if Input 2 unpatched).

behaviors.name: 1-to-6 mult
behaviors.description: With only Input 1 patched, signal is copied to all 6 outputs. Ideal for distributing pitch CV to multiple VCOs without voltage drop.

behaviors.name: Dual 1-to-3
behaviors.description: Two independent signals are each split to three outputs. Input 1 feeds outputs 1–3; Input 2 feeds outputs 4–6.

patchIdeas.name: Pitch CV distribution
patchIdeas.patch: Sequencer CV → Input 1 · Outputs 1–6 → VCO 1V/oct inputs
patchIdeas.diagram:
Buff Mult:
- Sequencer (CV) p> Buff Mult (Input 1)
- Buff Mult (Output 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult (Output 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult (Output 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Buff Mult (Output 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct) // Input 1 normalized to Input 2

patchIdeas.name: Clock splitting
patchIdeas.patch: Clock → Input 1 · distribute to multiple modules needing sync
patchIdeas.diagram:
Buff Mult:
- Clock Source (Clk) c> Buff Mult (Input 1)
- Buff Mult (Output 1) c> Sequencer (Clk)
- Buff Mult (Output 2) c> Drum (Trig)
- Buff Mult (Output 3) c> LFO (Sync)
